query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS facilities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('office', 'warehouse', 'production', 'retail', 'residential', 'land') NOT NULL,
  address VARCHAR(255),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  zip_code VARCHAR(20),
  country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'USA',
  square_footage INT,
  capacity INT,
  ownership_type ENUM('owned', 'leased', 'managed') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'under_construction', 'for_sale') DEFAULT 'active',
  acquired_date DATE,
  value DECIMAL(15,2),
  annual_cost DECIMAL(15,2),
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS land_parcels (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  parcel_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  acreage DECIMAL(10,2),
  zoning VARCHAR(100),
  address VARCHAR(255),
  county VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  ownership_type ENUM('fee_simple', 'leasehold', 'easement', 'trust') NOT NULL,
  acquired_date DATE,
  purchase_price DECIMAL(15,2),
  current_value DECIMAL(15,2),
  tax_assessment DECIMAL(15,2),
  annual_taxes DECIMAL(15,2),
  encumbrances JSON,
  status ENUM('active', 'pending_sale', 'in_development', 'conservation') DEFAULT 'active',
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS facility_maintenance (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  facility_id INT NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('routine', 'preventive', 'corrective', 'emergency') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  scheduled_date DATE,
  completed_date DATE,
  cost DECIMAL(15,2),
  vendor VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('scheduled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  INDEX idx_facility (facility_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);
